summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of CyberVoid file storage hub. Backend APIs are fully functional, frontend UI is responsive and feature-complete. All major flows tested successfully including auth, file management, settings, search, and mobile responsiveness.

validation_notes.issue: Return 422 status codes instead of expected 400 for validation errors
validation_notes.impact: No functional impact - FastAPI returns 422 for validation errors by design

authentication_notes.issue: test@void.net user may not exist initially, but registration creates functional users

passed_tests: Backend health check and all API endpoints
User registration with complete validation (username 3-24 chars, email format, password strength)
Dashboard with file stats, view toggles (grid/list), type filters
Upload page with drag zone, public/private toggle
Settings page with profile editing (display name, bio), accent color selection, wallpaper customization
Search functionality in sidebar with type filters (all/files/accounts)
Chat page loading and empty state display
Navigation between all pages (Dashboard, Upload, Messages, Settings)
Mobile responsive design with hamburger menu
Password strength validation with visual indicators
AMOLED black theme with accent color customization
